/**
 * Reusable animation configurations and presets for Framer Motion
 * Apple-inspired cinematic animations with smooth, premium feel
 */// Container animation setup for staggered children
export const containerVariants={hidden:{opacity:0},visible:{opacity:1,transition:{staggerChildren:0.1,delayChildren:0.2,duration:0.6}}};// Text animations for hero and section titles
export const textRevealVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,y:30},visible:{opacity:1,y:0,transition:{duration:0.8,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]// Custom easing for smooth motion
}}};// Fade-in animation
export const fadeInVariants={hidden:{opacity:0},visible:{opacity:1,transition:{duration:0.8,ease:"easeOut"}}};// Fade-up animation for scroll reveals
export const fadeUpVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,y:60},visible:{opacity:1,y:0,transition:{duration:0.8,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}};// Fade-left animation
export const fadeLeftVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,x:-60},visible:{opacity:1,x:0,transition:{duration:0.8,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}};// Fade-right animation
export const fadeRightVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,x:60},visible:{opacity:1,x:0,transition:{duration:0.8,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}};// Scale animation with fade
export const scaleVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,scale:0.8},visible:{opacity:1,scale:1,transition:{duration:0.8,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}};// Image zoom animation
export const imageZoomVariants={hidden:{scale:1.1,opacity:0},visible:{scale:1,opacity:1,transition:{duration:1.2,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}};// Blur to focus transition
export const blurFocusVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,filter:"blur(10px)"},visible:{opacity:1,filter:"blur(0px)",transition:{duration:0.8,ease:"easeOut"}}};// Slideshow slide transition
export const slideshowVariants={enter:direction=>({x:direction>0?1000:-1000,opacity:0}),center:{zIndex:1,x:0,opacity:1},exit:direction=>({zIndex:0,x:direction<0?1000:-1000,opacity:0})};// Hover animation for cards
export const hoverScaleVariants={rest:{scale:1},hover:{scale:1.05,transition:{duration:0.3,ease:"easeInOut"}}};// Button hover animation
export const buttonHoverVariants={rest:{scale:1,boxShadow:"0px 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)"},hover:{scale:1.02,boxShadow:"0px 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)",transition:{duration:0.3,ease:"easeInOut"}}};// Page transition animation
export const pageTransitionVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,y:20},visible:{opacity:1,y:0,transition:{duration:0.6,ease:"easeOut"}},exit:{opacity:0,y:-20,transition:{duration:0.3,ease:"easeIn"}}};// Parallax config for scroll-based animations
export const parallaxConfig={offset:["0 1","1.33","1 0"],// When element enters and leaves viewport
transition:"cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)"// Custom easing
};// Pulse animation for attention
export const pulseVariants={initial:{scale:1},animate:{scale:[1,1.05,1],transition:{duration:2,repeat:Infinity,ease:"easeInOut"}}};
